modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Video plays without sound when connected to classroom HDMI.

full_description_text:
- I was trying to play a video in the smart classroom.  
- The video has sound when I use my laptop speakers, but when I connect it via HDMI, the audio doesn't come through.  
- It's strange because other sounds from my laptop work fine, just not the video audio.
short_description: Video plays without sound when connected to classroom HDMI.
description:
- I was trying to play a video in the smart classroom.  
- The video has sound when I use my laptop speakers, but when I connect it via HDMI, the audio doesn't come through.  
- It's strange because other sounds from my laptop work fine, just not the video audio.
